�� Seasonal Tasks & Farming Guides

Here you'll find monthly farming checklists and comprehensive guides for different UK regions.

🌾 Scotland Farming Guide

Scotland's unique climate, soils, and topography create both challenges and opportunities for farmers. From the fertile lowlands of the Central Belt to the rugged Highlands, Scotland offers diverse agricultural possibilities supported by a range of government schemes.

🏹 Wales Farming Guide

Wales is known for its sheep farming, with over 6.6 million sheep across the country. The Welsh landscape, with its hills and valleys, is perfectly suited to sheep grazing and provides excellent conditions for sustainable farming.

❄️ January - Winter Farm Tasks

Winter is a critical time for planning and preparation. Focus on soil sampling, seed ordering, winter crop checks, and preparing for lambing season. This is also the time to apply for grants and funding.

🌱 March - Spring Preparation

March marks the beginning of spring farming activities. Spring sowing, potato planting, and fertiliser application are key tasks. This is also when lambing and calving begin in many regions.
